en.intro: Agentic Robot Motion is guided by the Chinese educational philosophy of “rote memorization → deep understanding → generalization by analogy.” We build productive entry-level robotic workers that generate real-world economic value through memorization-based learning; they evolve into single-domain experts through self-learning in practice, and ultimately generalize their capabilities by analogy—acting as correctors for future general-purpose agents and serving as intelligence primitives that seamlessly augment other agents and human workflows.
en.emptyHelp: Add JSON files under {path} and reload.

joinUs.title: Join ARM @ YMBot
joinUs.company: We are an intelligent robotics manufacturing company that builds robots and develops robotic intelligence systems.
joinUs.hiring: We are hiring VLA engineers (full-time), SLAM engineers (full-time), motion planning engineers (full-time), and VLA algorithm researchers (intern) who want to build embodied intelligence systems for real-world production tasks.
joinUs.contactTemplate: Contact us ({projectLeader} or {researchHead}) if you have any questions.

zh.logoHtml: ARM 机器人运动智能 @ YMBot
zh.intro: Agentic Robot Motion 受中国教育哲学 “机械记忆 → 深入理解 → 举一反三” 的启发。我们首先打造一批入门级机器人工作者，通过基于记忆的学习方式进入真实生产环境，在工厂中创造实际经济价值；接着在持续的实践过程中不断积累环境交互数据，从重复执行中归纳任务的深层结构与规律，由机械复现逐步走向对任务本质的理解，进化为单一领域专家；最终，通过对单一领域本质的掌握激发举一反三的能力——即使面对未见过的场景仍能自主有效应对：既可作为未来通用智能体系统的纠错器，也可作为智能基础单元无缝嵌入其他智能体与人类工作流，实现能力增强与协同扩展。
zh.emptyHelp: 请在 {path} 下添加 JSON 文件后刷新。

joinUs.title: 加入 ARM @ YMBot
joinUs.company: 我们是一家智能机器人智造公司，生产机器人并研发机器人智能系统。
joinUs.hiring: 我们正在招聘 VLA 工程师（全职）、SLAM 工程师（全职）、运动规划工程师（全职）以及 VLA 算法研究员（实习），共同构建面向真实生产任务的具身智能系统。
joinUs.contactTemplate: 如有任何问题，请联系（{projectLeader} 或 {researchHead}）。
